title: lithodora fruticosa
intro: Lithodora fruticosa, also known as Dendrimora fruticosa, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lithodora fruticosa include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and supporting immune function. Lithodora fruticosa can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
